children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation shall administer a financial assistance program for commercial driver’s license program implementation for the purposes described in paragraphs (2) and (3).

children.heading: .—State commercial driver’s license program implementation grants
children.label: 2 .—State commercial driver’s license program implementation grants
A
children.text: to assist the State in complying with the requirements of section 31311; and

children.label: ii
children.text: for publications, testing, personnel, training, and quality control;

children.label: iii
children.text: for commercial driver’s license program coordinators; and

children.label: iv
children.text: to implement or maintain a system to notify an employer of an operator of a commercial motor vehicle of the suspension or revocation of the operator’s commercial driver’s license consistent with the standards developed under section 32303(b) of the Commercial Motor Vehicle Safety Enhancement Act of 2012 ( note).49 U.S.C. 31304

children.label: A
children.text: benefit all jurisdictions of the United States;

children.label: B
children.text: address national safety concerns and circumstances;

children.label: C
children.text: address emerging issues relating to commercial driver’s license improvements;

children.label: D
children.text: support innovative ideas and solutions to commercial driver’s license program issues;

children.label: E
children.text: support, in addition to funds otherwise available for such purposes, the recognition, prevention, and reporting of human trafficking; or

children.label: F
children.text: address other commercial driver’s license issues, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: .—Prohibitions
children.label: b .—Prohibitions
children.text: A recipient may not use financial assistance funds awarded under this section to rent, lease, or buy land or buildings.

children.heading: .—Report
children.label: c .—Report
children.text: The Secretary shall issue an annual report on the activities carried out under this section.

children.heading: .—Apportionment
children.label: d .—Apportionment
children.text: All amounts made available to carry out this section for a fiscal year shall be apportioned to a recipient described in subsection (a)(3) according to criteria prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: .—Funding
children.label: e .—Funding
children.text: For fiscal years beginning after , this section shall be funded under section 31104.September 30, 2016
